name: Kayla Johnson
ai_summary: Kayla Johnson from Riverdale, GA has informal childcare experience through raising her own child and caring for nieces and nephews, though no formal childcare background. She seeks full-time work and demonstrates conflict resolution through timeouts and requiring apologies, believing her lifelong experience with children makes her a great fit.
